summary: Fixed TrayManager runtime error by adding nativeImage to electron imports patch script. Previously, nativeImage was being used but not included in the destructured imports, causing 'electron is not defined' error in TrayManager.createStatusIcon. Rebuilt successfully with both fixes: preload path (index.cjs) and nativeImage export.
current_status: Ready for testing - All runtime errors should now be resolved
fixes_applied: Added nativeImage to exports list in patch script
Preload path fixed from index.js to index.cjs (previous fix)
next_steps: Run npm run start to verify application launches without errors
Test API key configuration and usage display
